description: Express app where lodash _.template() is only called in a test file, not in production code. CVE-2021-23337 should be not_affected in production context.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: _.template() is only called in test/app.test.js. Production code in app.js never imports or uses lodash at all.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable function _.template() is only called in test/app.test.js which is not part of the production runtime. The main app.js has no lodash usage whatsoever.
